calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2017 Continued To Dec-20-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Zekes Notice Of Proveup Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR 6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Robert N. Weaver, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Zeke's Diamond Bar, Inc., a California Corporation.
Eileen Chen, President of Zeke's Diamond Bar, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defaulted defendant Timothy Nelson.
Default was entered against defendant on September 16, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 1, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Zeke's Diamond Bar, Inc. a California Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Timothy Nelson, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $48,622.80.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,513.96
Costs - $894.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $56,031.26.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
